place.summary: The Peak Tram functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Victoria Peak. Visitors often continue to Victoria Peak. Its observed experience trails the category average, despite existing visitor demand.

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Victoria Peak
opportunity_cards.detail: The Peak Tram frequently appears alongside Victoria Peak, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to Victoria Peak
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from The Peak Tram to Victoria Peak, with relatively strong journey experience.

opportunity_cards.title: High visibility, weaker experience
opportunity_cards.detail: The Peak Tram draws meaningful traffic but performs below its category average on experience.

journey_examples.trajectory: The Peak Tram -> Hong Kong Disneyland
